lines.text: Financial highlights table presents net asset value per share rollforward per ASC 946 946-205-45-1, 946-205-50-1.
Expense ratio (operating expenses to average net assets) disclosed per ASC 946 946-205-50-15.
Schedule of investments summarizes portfolio composition by industry, country, and issuer per ASC 946 946-210-45-4.
Statement of operations separates realized and unrealized gains and losses per ASC 946 946-225-45-5.
Top 10 portfolio holdings as of 2026-03-31: Apple Inc 7.2%, Microsoft Corp 6.4% per ASC 946 946-210-50-1, 946-210-50-6, N-1A Item 27(d)(1).
Schedule of derivative instruments: index futures notional $500000000 per ASC 815 815-10-50-4, ASC 946-210-50-12.
Brokerage commissions by broker: Goldman Sachs $125000, Morgan Stanley $98500. research services under soft-dollar policy. per ASC 946 946-225-45-3, Item 31, Rule 17a-7.
Portfolio turnover ratio 4.9% using lesser of purchases or sales divided by average net assets per ASC 946 946-205-50-15, N-1A Item 27.
